commands.command: python3 frozen seven-file path-and-content SHA-256 algorithm

commands.summary: Compiled 31 files with Solc 0.8.24 successfully; warnings only.
35 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped across four suites; P1 suites contributed 15 ledger and 12 attestation tests.

commands.command: forge fmt --check src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol src/GlyphAttestationRegistry.sol src/interfaces/IGlyphReceiptLedger.sol src/libraries/GlyphSignatureChecker.sol test/GlyphReceiptLedger.t.sol test/GlyphAttestationRegistry.t.sol test/mocks/MockERC1271Wallet.sol

evidence: contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:461-465 enforces block.timestamp >= immutable expiry before EXPIRED/REFUND_PENDING
contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:566-584 rejects reservation, delivery, provider, fee, delta, and source-finalization evidence on the refund path
contracts/test/GlyphReceiptLedger.t.sol:391-424 exercises expiry equality and delivery-before-refund ordering
priorFindings.notes: Actual source closes the delivery/refund race identified in review2; checks are leg-presence based and therefore independent of append/status ordering.

evidence: contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:226-245 accepts delivered >= expected and validates expected, actual, excess, and RECIPIENT_RETAINS
contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:272-275 stores reconciliation only after independent STN-Delta conservation
contracts/test/GlyphReceiptLedger.t.sol:426-470 covers underdelivery rejection and overdelivery recording
priorFindings.notes: Overdelivery is not credited into source principal, fee, or residual accounting.

evidence: contracts/src/GlyphAttestationRegistry.sol:79-100 makes purpose records role-scoped
contracts/src/GlyphAttestationRegistry.sol:387-435 authorizes and indexes the exact operation role
contracts/src/GlyphAttestationRegistry.sol:451-463 requires distinct nonzero payer-role and recipient-role records
priorFindings.notes: The implementation now requires separate role records even when payer and recipient addresses coincide; the explicitly required coincident-party regression is still absent and is captured under P1-R3-002.

evidence: contracts/src/GlyphAttestationRegistry.sol:259-261 derives expiry using expiresAt <= block.timestamp
contracts/src/GlyphAttestationRegistry.sol:513-520 rejects an expired claim before binding
priorFindings.notes: Production boundary behavior is corrected. The exact-equality binding test remains missing and is included in P1-R3-002.

evidence: contracts/test/GlyphReceiptLedger.t.sol:142-154 still derives both expected hashes from the implementation and mutates none of the locked fields
contracts/test/GlyphReceiptLedger.t.sol:162-179 never calls role configuration as a non-admin and never performs a financial write as admin-without-role
contracts/test/GlyphReceiptLedger.t.sol:181-200 never reaches RECONCILED or REFUNDED before its claimed terminal-reentry check
contracts/test/GlyphReceiptLedger.t.sol:243-267 does not isolate every missing leg or reach the conservation guard with huge inputs
contracts/test/GlyphReceiptLedger.t.sol:353-379 supplies neither a wrong destination chain nor a wrong router despite naming both
priorFindings.notes: Repair2 added useful tests but did not close the material name/branch evidence gaps from review2.

evidence: contracts/test/GlyphAttestationRegistry.t.sol:165-183 has no changed-chain or second-verifying-contract signature case despite naming wrong domain
contracts/test/GlyphAttestationRegistry.t.sol:185-201 covers magic/wrong/revert but not malformed or short EIP-1271 return data
contracts/test/GlyphAttestationRegistry.t.sol:251-295 does not attempt a fresh binding of the revoked claim and tests expiry after, not at, equality
contracts/test/GlyphAttestationRegistry.t.sol:376-388 fails signature authorization before proving an authentically authorized non-party reaches UnauthorizedAttestor
contracts/test/GlyphAttestationRegistry.t.sol contains no malformed v, high-s, zero-s/r/recovered-zero ECDSA vectors or nonexistent-getter tests
priorFindings.notes: The signature checker source is defensively implemented, but required adversarial acceptance evidence remains absent.

evidence: contracts/src/GlyphAttestationRegistry.sol:30-41 stores registeredAt
contracts/src/GlyphAttestationRegistry.sol:173-184 emits registeredAt
contracts/src/GlyphAttestationRegistry.sol:486-510 assigns block.timestamp as registry admission time
priorFindings.notes: The ABI no longer labels registry admission as issuer-verified issuance time.

findings.title: Ledger tests still do not prove required accounting and authority branches
evidence: contracts/test/GlyphReceiptLedger.t.sol:142-154 uses computeTermsHash/computeOperationId as its own oracle and does not mutate routers, vault, fee, claimant rule, chain/domain, or nonce
contracts/test/GlyphReceiptLedger.t.sol:162-179 omits unauthorized configureWriterAuthorization and admin-without-role financial writes
contracts/test/GlyphReceiptLedger.t.sol:181-200 claims terminal reentry without first reaching a terminal state

contracts/test/GlyphReceiptLedger.t.sol:243-267 labels missing/mismatched/overflow coverage but the huge principal mismatches the stored provider leg before conservation and no required leg is missing
contracts/test/GlyphReceiptLedger.t.sol:269-291 contains valid/double refund only, not mismatched refund fields
contracts/test/GlyphReceiptLedger.t.sol:353-379 names wrong destination chain and wrong router but exercises neither
findings.impact: Security- and accounting-sensitive behavior is not accepted by explicit adversarial evidence. Passing tests can regress field binding, role separation, per-leg reconciliation checks, overflow-safe conservation, or refund matching without the named suite detecting every required branch.
findings.requiredFix: Add isolated selector-specific tests for each locked terms field, unauthorized admin configuration and admin non-bypass, actual post-RECONCILED and post-REFUNDED reentry, every required missing leg and immutable leg mismatch, a huge-input case that reaches InvalidConservationEquation, and each refund field/proof mismatch. Correct test names so every stated branch is genuinely reached.

findings.title: Attestation tests omit required signature, boundary, getter, and role-consensus adversarial cases
evidence: contracts/test/GlyphAttestationRegistry.t.sol:165-183 never signs under a changed chain or another registry/verifying contract
contracts/test/GlyphAttestationRegistry.t.sol:185-201 and contracts/test/mocks/MockERC1271Wallet.sol:4-27 cannot produce malformed or short return data
contracts/test/GlyphAttestationRegistry.t.sol:251-295 omits revoked-claim fresh-binding rejection and exact expiry equality
contracts/test/GlyphAttestationRegistry.t.sol:331-389 omits payer==recipient dual-role consensus and uses an unsigned outsider that fails before party authorization

contracts/test/GlyphAttestationRegistry.t.sol has no explicit low-s/high-s, invalid-v, zero-s/r, recovered-zero, wrong-chain, wrong-verifying-contract, or nonexistent claim/binding/purpose getter vectors
findings.impact: Required replay/domain and wallet-signature trust boundaries, exact expiry semantics, coincident-role consensus, and fail-closed reads lack acceptance-grade tests. These are security-sensitive paths, so source inspection and a green aggregate suite are insufficient under the locked acceptance rule.
findings.requiredFix: Add focused tests using changed chain ID and a second registry, explicit ECDSA edge vectors, raw malformed/short/wrong/reverting EIP-1271 return mocks, exact expiry equality, fresh binding attempts for revoked/superseded claims, nonexistent getters, validly authorized non-party purpose attempts, and payer==recipient with two independently authorized role records.

findings.title: Two named authoritative architecture inputs are absent from the frozen workspace
evidence: docs/architecture/INVARIANT_MATRIX.md is absent; the only matching invariant specification is docs/architecture/INVARIANTS.md
docs/architecture/MONADGLYPH_TARGET_ARCHITECTURE.md is absent and no TARGET_ARCHITECTURE file exists under the workspace
docs/architecture contains 14 architecture Markdown files, including INVARIANTS.md, RECEIPT_LEDGER.md, IDENTITY_ATTESTATIONS.md, and STATE_MACHINES.md
findings.impact: The review could apply P1_LOCKED_DECISIONS.md, the available invariant specification, prior review/handoff, and current source, but could not inspect the requested target-architecture sections under the exact authoritative path.
findings.requiredFix: Restore the named authoritative files or update the review instruction/canonical documentation index to the actual authoritative paths before the next acceptance review.

evidence: contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:586-592 implements subtraction-based conservation; tests cover zero/minimal/nonzero residual, but required isolated over/under/huge rejection evidence is incomplete (P1-R3-001).
contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:226-245 and contracts/test/GlyphReceiptLedger.t.sol:426-470 enforce delivered >= expected and record RECIPIENT_RETAINS excess.
contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:477-522 requires destination-delivery evidence before DESTINATION_SETTLED and SOURCE_FINALIZED.
P1_LOCKED_DECISIONS.md:9-17 excludes source-router transfers, callback retry, and atomic local settlement from P1.
contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:207-212,295-323,427-429,566-584 makes RECONCILED/REFUNDED mutually exclusive and blocks unsafe refund evidence.
contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:375-402 binds all OperationTerms plus chain and verifying contract; required field-mutation test evidence is incomplete (P1-R3-001).
contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:179-190 consumes unique remote message IDs, while messenger adapter source-domain authentication is deferred beyond P1.
contracts/src/interfaces/IGlyphReceiptLedger.sol:20-25 and contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:172-190 separate LOCAL_VERIFIED, AUTHENTICATED_ADAPTER, and LIGHT_CLIENT_VERIFIED.
contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:193-200,431-469 enumerates transitions and reserves terminal outcomes for reconcile/refund.
contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:566-584 rejects known reservation/delivery/settlement/finalization evidence; cross-chain finality/challenge timing is outside P1.
Claim execution and fragment-secret authorization are explicitly outside the P1 ledger/attestation scope.
contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:137-170 stores immutable operation terms keyed by their domain-bound hash with no mutation path.
contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:94-105,172-204 applies distinct financial writer roles; admin has no direct write bypass.
contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:329-360 derives exact leg IDs and rejects duplicate IDs and duplicate semantic leg types.
contracts/src/GlyphAttestationRegistry.sol:296-323,466-511 enforces subject/issuer paths and EIP-712/EIP-1271; adversarial signature evidence remains incomplete (P1-R3-002).
contracts/src/GlyphAttestationRegistry.sol:10-18,296-316 forces SELF_ASSERTED or ISSUER_VERIFIED; acknowledgement is separate and does not mutate level.
contracts/src/GlyphAttestationRegistry.sol:358-385,513-537 changes claim status append-only while preserving existing binding snapshots.
contracts/src/GlyphAttestationRegistry.sol:387-463 implements role-scoped append-only purpose consensus; payer==recipient and valid non-party tests are missing (P1-R3-002).
Reviewed P1 structs, public/external inputs, storage, and events: identity/purpose/private content is bytes32 commitments/references; dynamic bytes is signature-only.
URL fragment handling is frontend/SDK behavior outside the seven-file P1 source scope.
contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:375-397 binds recoveryAddress; reconciliation/refund checks at lines 213-220 and 307-316 enforce it.
contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:218-221,255-272 bounds realized fees and records fee realization in reconciliation.
P1 ledger stores generic proof kinds/references and contains no messenger-specific imports or storage.
Destination vault liquidity accounting is explicitly deferred beyond P1.
P1 contracts contain no token transfer, escrow, or external value-moving path.
contracts/src/GlyphReceiptLedger.sol:202-275 requires source escrow, destination delivery, provider, fee, delta, source finalization, and conservation before RECONCILED.
No deployment was requested or performed; deployment evidence is outside this local P1 source review.
The seven-file P1 surface has no dependency on GlyphSessionProxy or the deprecated authority storage slot.

gaps: P1-R2-005 remains open: multiple ledger tests do not reach every branch stated in their names or required by the lock.
P1-R2-006 remains open: changed-chain/verifying-contract, malformed ECDSA/EIP-1271, exact expiry, nonexistent getter, valid non-party, and coincident-role tests are absent.
A green 35-test regression confirms compilation/execution but is not acceptance evidence for omitted security/accounting branches.
